text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Oka Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove vows to put on a good race for Mejiro
Dober and, of course, live up to her name as
Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins the first race for the Triple Tiara.
